overall.description: Stationary first-person perspective from a luxury cyberpunk apartment bedroom at night. The viewer lies on a bed watching a television cycle through colorful advertisements, while rain streaks down large windows overlooking the city. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring high-fidelity rendering and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury bedroom with entertainment center and panoramic city view

television switches to cyberpunk advertisement with purple neon graphics and stylized portrait

agents.ego_description: lying on bed in a relaxed position watching television advertisements

entered.detail: large bed with white sheets and textured gray comforter in the foreground
large flatscreen display showing cycling advertisements and animations
floor-to-ceiling windows with rain streaks showing nighttime cityscape with distant lights
curved ceiling with horizontal wooden slats and recessed lighting
dark wooden dresser with ambient lighting and decorative objects

segments.scene_description: A stationary first-person view from a luxurious cyberpunk apartment bedroom at night. The camera lies on a bed facing a television that cycles through various colorful advertisements and animations. Large windows reveal a rainy cityscape outside with streaks on the glass, while warm ambient lighting illuminates the modern interior featuring wooden ceiling slats and minimalist furniture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary first-person perspective within a luxurious cyberpunk bedroom, capturing a mood of nocturnal solitude amidst high-tech opulence. It begins with the viewer lying on a bed, facing a television that cycles through a series of vibrant, colorful advertisements and animations. As the screen flickers, the gaze expands to encompass the modern interior, where warm ambient lighting glows against minimalist furniture and wooden ceiling slats. The scene then shifts focus toward the large windows, where rain streaks down the glass to reveal a blurred, neon-lit cityscape outside.
